words.example: Students can acquire valuable skills through internships and part-time work experience.
words.exampleZh: 学生可以通过实习和兼职工作经历获得宝贵的技能。

words.example: Regular exercise can greatly enhance both your physical health and mental well-being.
words.exampleZh: 经常锻炼能极大地提高你的身体健康和心理健康。

words.example: The company plans to establish a new research center in the southern region.
words.exampleZh: 该公司计划在南部地区建立一个新的研究中心。

words.example: It is essential to maintain a balanced diet in order to stay healthy.
words.exampleZh: 为了保持健康，维持均衡的饮食至关重要。

words.example: Recent surveys indicate that young people increasingly prefer online shopping.
words.exampleZh: 近期的调查表明，年轻人越来越倾向于网上购物。

words.example: The experiment clearly demonstrates the harmful effects of air pollution on plants.
words.exampleZh: 这个实验清楚地证明了空气污染对植物的有害影响。

words.example: You must obtain the manager's approval before signing any official contract.
words.exampleZh: 在签署任何正式合同之前，你必须获得经理的批准。

words.example: Volunteers contribute their time and energy to help disadvantaged children.
words.exampleZh: 志愿者们贡献自己的时间和精力来帮助弱势儿童。

words.example: The investigation revealed serious problems in the company's financial management.
words.exampleZh: 这项调查揭示了该公司财务管理中的严重问题。

words.example: Many graduates choose to pursue further studies abroad after finishing college.
words.exampleZh: 许多毕业生在大学毕业后选择出国深造。

words.example: The government has decided to implement stricter rules on industrial emissions.
words.exampleZh: 政府已决定实施更严格的工业排放规定。

words.example: A good speaker can convey complex ideas in a simple and clear manner.
words.exampleZh: 优秀的演讲者能够以简单明了的方式传达复杂的观点。

words.example: Cultural exchanges help promote mutual understanding between different nations.
words.exampleZh: 文化交流有助于促进不同国家之间的相互理解。

words.example: Teachers should evaluate each student's progress fairly and objectively.
words.exampleZh: 老师应当公平客观地评估每位学生的进步。

words.example: With determination and patience, she finally overcame her fear of public speaking.
words.exampleZh: 凭借决心和耐心，她最终克服了对公开演讲的恐惧。

words.example: New employees often need time to adapt to the working environment of a company.
words.exampleZh: 新员工通常需要时间来适应公司的工作环境。

words.example: The professor emphasized the importance of independent thinking in academic research.
words.exampleZh: 教授强调了独立思考在学术研究中的重要性。

words.example: Travelers may encounter unexpected difficulties when visiting unfamiliar places.
words.exampleZh: 旅行者在游览陌生地方时可能会遇到意想不到的困难。

words.example: Modern technology has greatly facilitated communication across the whole world.
words.exampleZh: 现代科技极大地促进了全世界范围内的交流。

words.example: The team agreed to undertake the challenging project despite the limited budget.
words.exampleZh: 尽管预算有限，团队还是同意承担这个具有挑战性的项目。

words.example: A careful analysis of the data helped the researchers reach a reliable conclusion.
words.exampleZh: 对数据的细致分析帮助研究人员得出了可靠的结论。

words.example: She spent two years collecting material for her graduation thesis on linguistics.
words.exampleZh: 她花了两年时间为自己的语言学毕业论文收集资料。

words.example: The university has updated its curriculum to meet the needs of modern society.
words.exampleZh: 这所大学更新了课程，以满足现代社会的需求。

words.example: Students are expected to submit their assignments before the end of the week.
words.exampleZh: 学生需要在本周末之前提交他们的作业。

words.example: He won a full scholarship that covered all his tuition and living expenses.
words.exampleZh: 他获得了一项全额奖学金，涵盖了他所有的学费和生活费。

words.example: Economics is a discipline that examines how people use limited resources.
words.exampleZh: 经济学是一门研究人们如何使用有限资源的学科。

words.example: The visiting professor delivered an inspiring lecture on artificial intelligence.
words.exampleZh: 客座教授就人工智能发表了一场鼓舞人心的讲座。

words.example: Wide reading is one of the best ways to improve your reading comprehension.
words.exampleZh: 广泛阅读是提高阅读理解能力的最佳方法之一。

words.example: A professional qualification can significantly increase your chances of employment.
words.exampleZh: 专业资格能够大大增加你的就业机会。

words.example: Her outstanding academic performance earned her admission to a top university.
words.exampleZh: 她出色的学业表现使她获得了一所顶尖大学的录取资格。

words.example: University offers students rich opportunities for intellectual growth and development.
words.exampleZh: 大学为学生提供了丰富的智力成长与发展的机会。

words.example: The course combines theoretical knowledge with practical laboratory experiments.
words.exampleZh: 这门课程将理论知识与实际的实验室实验结合起来。

words.example: The textbook provides a comprehensive overview of modern world history.
words.exampleZh: 这本教科书全面概述了现代世界历史。

words.example: Scientists must test every hypothesis through repeated and careful experiments.
words.exampleZh: 科学家必须通过反复而细致的实验来检验每一个假设。

words.example: Different readers may interpret the same poem in completely different ways.
words.exampleZh: 不同的读者可能会以完全不同的方式诠释同一首诗。

words.example: Please summarize the main points of the article in no more than three sentences.
words.exampleZh: 请用不超过三句话总结这篇文章的要点。

words.example: Originality is an important criterion for judging an academic research paper.
words.exampleZh: 独创性是评判一篇学术研究论文的重要标准。

words.example: Raising the literacy rate is a key goal of the national education programme.
words.exampleZh: 提高识字率是国家教育计划的一个关键目标。

words.example: After three years of hard study, he finally received his college diploma.
words.exampleZh: 经过三年的刻苦学习，他终于拿到了大学文凭。

words.example: Every graduate student must present a paper at the weekly seminar.
words.exampleZh: 每位研究生都必须在每周的研讨课上做论文报告。

words.example: The national economy has grown steadily over the past decade despite challenges.
words.exampleZh: 尽管面临挑战，国家经济在过去十年里仍稳步增长。

words.example: Foreign investment has played a vital role in the development of the region.
words.exampleZh: 外国投资在该地区的发展中发挥了至关重要的作用。

words.example: The department had to cut its annual budget because of falling revenue.
words.exampleZh: 由于收入下降，该部门不得不削减年度预算。

words.example: The company made a substantial profit by expanding into overseas markets.
words.exampleZh: 该公司通过拓展海外市场获得了可观的利润。

words.example: Companies must understand consumer demand in order to design popular products.
words.exampleZh: 企业必须了解消费者需求，才能设计出受欢迎的产品。

words.example: Small and medium enterprises create the majority of new jobs in the country.
words.exampleZh: 中小型企业为这个国家创造了大部分的新就业岗位。

words.example: Most graduates expect a reasonable salary that matches their qualifications.
words.exampleZh: 大多数毕业生期望获得与其资历相称的合理薪水。

words.example: A good relationship with your colleagues makes the workplace more enjoyable.
words.exampleZh: 与同事保持良好的关系会使工作场所更加愉快。

words.example: Electronic commerce has fundamentally changed the way people buy and sell goods.
words.exampleZh: 电子商务从根本上改变了人们买卖商品的方式。

words.example: The two firms spent weeks trying to negotiate a fair and lasting agreement.
words.exampleZh: 两家公司花了数周时间试图协商出一份公平而持久的协议。

words.example: The firm plans to recruit ten skilled engineers for its new project.
words.exampleZh: 该公司计划为其新项目招聘十名熟练的工程师。

words.example: After years of hard work, she finally earned a well-deserved promotion.
words.exampleZh: 经过多年的努力，她终于获得了一次当之无愧的晋升。

words.example: To survive in a competitive market, businesses must keep improving their services.
words.exampleZh: 为了在竞争激烈的市场中生存，企业必须不断改进服务。

words.example: An efficient management system can save the company a great deal of money.
words.exampleZh: 高效的管理系统能为公司节省大量资金。

words.example: Flexible working hours have been shown to increase employee productivity.
words.exampleZh: 弹性工作时间已被证明能够提高员工的生产力。

words.example: The family tried to reduce its monthly expenditure on entertainment and dining.
words.exampleZh: 这家人努力减少每月在娱乐和餐饮上的支出。

words.example: A successful entrepreneur is willing to take risks and learn from failure.
words.exampleZh: 成功的创业者愿意承担风险并从失败中学习。

words.example: The government's tax revenue rose sharply during the period of rapid growth.
words.exampleZh: 在快速增长期间，政府的税收大幅上升。

words.example: Education is widely regarded as the foundation of long-term national prosperity.
words.exampleZh: 教育被普遍视为国家长期繁荣的基础。

words.example: The company offers financial incentives to boost employee productivity.
words.exampleZh: 公司提供经济奖励以提高员工的生产率。

words.example: Volunteering is a meaningful way to give back to your local community.
words.exampleZh: 做志愿者是回馈当地社区的一种有意义的方式。

words.example: Many families still keep the tradition of gathering together during festivals.
words.exampleZh: 许多家庭仍然保留着在节日期间团聚的传统。

words.example: Cultural diversity makes a society more vibrant, creative and open-minded.
words.exampleZh: 文化多样性使社会更加充满活力、富有创造力且思想开放。

words.example: Studying abroad has become a common phenomenon among Chinese students today.
words.exampleZh: 如今出国留学已成为中国学生中的一种普遍现象。

words.example: The younger generation tends to rely heavily on smartphones for daily life.
words.exampleZh: 年轻一代往往在日常生活中严重依赖智能手机。

words.example: We have a duty to protect our cultural heritage for future generations.
words.exampleZh: 我们有责任为子孙后代保护我们的文化遗产。

words.example: The government has introduced new policies to improve public welfare and health.
words.exampleZh: 政府出台了新政策以改善公共福利和健康。

words.example: Education plays a key role in reducing prejudice against different social groups.
words.exampleZh: 教育在减少对不同社会群体的偏见方面起着关键作用。

words.example: Rapid urbanization has brought both opportunities and challenges to rural areas.
words.exampleZh: 快速的城市化给农村地区带来了机遇，也带来了挑战。

words.example: The city is home to people from many different ethnic backgrounds.
words.exampleZh: 这座城市居住着来自许多不同民族背景的人。

words.example: Ancient Chinese civilization has made remarkable contributions to human progress.
words.exampleZh: 古代中华文明为人类进步作出了卓越的贡献。

words.example: Parents have a moral responsibility to set a good example for their children.
words.exampleZh: 父母有道德责任为他们的孩子树立好榜样。

words.example: Open communication is often the best way to resolve a serious conflict.
words.exampleZh: 坦诚的沟通往往是解决严重冲突的最佳方式。

words.example: The new law aims to promote gender equality in the workplace.
words.exampleZh: 这项新法律旨在促进职场中的性别平等。

words.example: Living in harmony with nature is essential for the survival of mankind.
words.exampleZh: 与自然和谐相处对于人类的生存至关重要。

words.example: The opening ceremony of the festival attracted thousands of enthusiastic visitors.
words.exampleZh: 该节日的开幕典礼吸引了数千名热情的游客。

words.example: Long-term social isolation can have a negative effect on mental health.
words.exampleZh: 长期的社会孤立会对心理健康产生负面影响。

words.example: It takes years to build a good reputation but only moments to ruin it.
words.exampleZh: 建立良好的声誉需要数年，而毁掉它只需片刻。

words.example: Remote working has gradually become the norm in many modern industries.
words.exampleZh: 远程办公已逐渐成为许多现代行业的常态。

words.example: The documentary challenges common stereotypes about rural communities.
words.exampleZh: 这部纪录片挑战了人们对农村社区的常见刻板印象。

words.example: Modern technology has transformed almost every aspect of our daily lives.
words.exampleZh: 现代科技几乎改变了我们日常生活的方方面面。

words.example: Continuous innovation is the key to a company's long-term competitiveness.
words.exampleZh: 持续创新是公司长期竞争力的关键。

words.example: Air pollution in big cities poses a serious threat to public health.
words.exampleZh: 大城市的空气污染对公众健康构成了严重威胁。

words.example: We should all take action to protect the environment from further damage.
words.exampleZh: 我们都应当采取行动，保护环境免受进一步破坏。

words.example: Water is a precious natural resource that should never be wasted.
words.exampleZh: 水是一种宝贵的自然资源，绝不应被浪费。

words.example: Many countries are now investing heavily in sustainable energy projects.
words.exampleZh: 许多国家如今正大量投资于可持续能源项目。

words.example: Solar and wind power are clean and renewable sources of energy.
words.exampleZh: 太阳能和风能是清洁且可再生的能源。

words.example: Wearable devices can monitor your heart rate and sleep quality automatically.
words.exampleZh: 可穿戴设备能够自动监测你的心率和睡眠质量。

words.example: The factory installed an automatic system to inspect products for defects.
words.exampleZh: 工厂安装了一套自动系统来检查产品是否有缺陷。

words.example: The rise of the digital economy has created millions of new jobs.
words.exampleZh: 数字经济的兴起创造了数百万个新的就业岗位。

words.example: Reducing carbon emission is essential to slowing down global climate change.
words.exampleZh: 减少碳排放对于减缓全球气候变化至关重要。

words.example: The destruction of forests can severely damage the local ecosystem.
words.exampleZh: 森林的破坏会严重损害当地的生态系统。

words.example: The scientists repeated the experiment several times to confirm their results.
words.exampleZh: 科学家们多次重复实验，以确认他们的结果。

words.example: Artificial intelligence is gradually being applied to medicine and education.
words.exampleZh: 人工智能正逐渐被应用于医学和教育领域。

words.example: Wildlife conservation requires the joint efforts of governments and citizens.
words.exampleZh: 野生动物保护需要政府和公民的共同努力。

words.example: Improving energy efficiency can help households save on their electricity bills.
words.exampleZh: 提高能源效率可以帮助家庭节省电费开支。

words.example: Satellites are used to transmit television signals across long distances.
words.exampleZh: 卫星被用来远距离传输电视信号。

words.example: The overuse of pesticide can pollute the soil and harm useful insects.
words.exampleZh: 杀虫剂的过度使用会污染土壤并伤害有益的昆虫。

words.example: The reserve was established to protect the biological diversity of the wetland.
words.exampleZh: 建立这个保护区是为了保护湿地的生物多样性。

words.example: Industrial waste may contaminate rivers and threaten the supply of drinking water.
words.exampleZh: 工业废料可能污染河流，并威胁饮用水的供应。

words.meaning: 重要的；显著的（替换 important）
words.example: The report points out a significant rise in the number of online learners.
words.exampleZh: 报告指出在线学习者的数量显著增加。

words.meaning: 必不可少的；本质的（替换 necessary）
words.example: Teamwork is essential if a project is to be completed successfully and on time.
words.exampleZh: 如果一个项目要成功且按时完成，团队合作是必不可少的。

words.meaning: 众多的；许多的（替换 many）
words.example: There are numerous reasons why people choose to live in big cities.
words.exampleZh: 人们选择在大城市生活有许多原因。

words.meaning: 有益的；有利的（替换 good）
words.example: A moderate amount of exercise is beneficial to both body and mind.
words.exampleZh: 适量的运动对身心都有益处。

words.example: Time management plays a crucial role in achieving academic success.
words.exampleZh: 时间管理在取得学业成功方面起着至关重要的作用。

words.meaning: 相当大的；可观的（替换 big）
words.example: The new policy has brought considerable benefits to low-income families.
words.exampleZh: 这项新政策给低收入家庭带来了相当大的好处。

words.meaning: 巨大的；极好的（替换 great）
words.example: The internet has had a tremendous impact on the way we obtain information.
words.exampleZh: 互联网对我们获取信息的方式产生了巨大的影响。

words.meaning: 极其重要的；至关重要的（替换 important）
words.example: A balanced diet is vital for maintaining good health and high energy.
words.exampleZh: 均衡的饮食对于保持健康和充沛精力极其重要。

words.example: The university attracts students from diverse cultural and social backgrounds.
words.exampleZh: 这所大学吸引了来自多种文化和社会背景的学生。

words.meaning: 非凡的；显著的（替换 amazing）
words.example: Over the past years, the country has made remarkable economic achievements.
words.exampleZh: 在过去的几年里，这个国家取得了非凡的经济成就。

words.example: The plan is too costly; moreover, it may bring serious environmental risks.
words.exampleZh: 这个计划成本太高；此外，它可能带来严重的环境风险。

words.example: The product is affordable; furthermore, it is easy to use and durable.
words.exampleZh: 这款产品价格实惠；再者，它易于使用且经久耐用。

words.example: He failed to prepare for the exam and consequently received a low grade.
words.exampleZh: 他没有为考试做准备，因此得了一个低分。

words.meaning: 无疑地；毫无疑问（替换 surely）
words.example: Reading widely is undoubtedly one of the best ways to broaden the mind.
words.exampleZh: 广泛阅读无疑是开阔思维的最佳方式之一。

words.example: Many experts advocate a healthier lifestyle to prevent chronic diseases.
words.exampleZh: 许多专家提倡更健康的生活方式以预防慢性疾病。

words.meaning: 说明；阐明；举例（替换 show）
words.example: The following example clearly illustrates the importance of teamwork.
words.exampleZh: 下面的例子清楚地说明了团队合作的重要性。

words.meaning: 达到；获得；实现（替换 reach）
words.example: With consistent effort, anyone can attain their long-term personal goals.
words.exampleZh: 只要坚持努力，任何人都能实现自己的长期个人目标。

words.meaning: 减少；削弱；降低（替换 reduce）
words.example: Wearing a mask can effectively diminish the risk of catching the virus.
words.exampleZh: 佩戴口罩可以有效降低感染病毒的风险。

words.meaning: 丰富的；大量的（替换 plenty of）
words.example: The region is rich in abundant natural resources and fertile farmland.
words.exampleZh: 该地区拥有丰富的自然资源和肥沃的农田。

words.example: As technology advances, changes in the job market seem entirely inevitable.
words.exampleZh: 随着技术的进步，就业市场的变化似乎是完全不可避免的。
